stops.name: Tirana
stops.notes: Arrived via British Airways and connected by bus to Himara.
stops.description: First stop in Albania. Passed through the bus terminal and headed straight to the coast.

stops.name: Himare
stops.notes: 4 nights on the Albanian Riviera at The Sea Cave Camping. Beautiful coastline surrounded by limestone cliffs.
stops.description: Four nights camping on the Albanian Riviera. Spent time swimming, exploring sea caves, and hiking along the coast.

stops.name: Shkoder
stops.notes: Stayed in a hostel before heading into the mountains.
stops.description: Two nights at Wanderer's Hostel. Explored the old town and Rozafa Castle before gearing up for the trail.

stops.name: Shala River
stops.notes: Reached by boat through Koman Lake. Camped along the turquoise river.
stops.description: Traveled by boat through the Koman reservoir to reach the Shala River canyon. One of the more remote spots on the trip.

stops.name: Valbona
stops.notes: Starting point for the Peaks of the Balkans trail. Alpine valley surrounded by peaks.
stops.description: Arrived by ferry and bus from Shala. The entry point to the Peaks of the Balkans multi-day hike.

stops.name: Cerem
stops.notes: First full day of hiking out of Valbona. Remote village in the Albanian Alps.
stops.description: Hiked out of Valbona valley through forest and alpine meadows. Stayed at Guesthouse Kujtim Gocaj.

stops.name: Doberdol
stops.notes: High mountain pasture settlement near the Kosovo border. Ridge views in all directions.
stops.description: Hiked from Cerem through some of the most dramatic ridge terrain on the route. Near the Kosovo border.

stops.name: Milishevc
stops.notes: Crossed into Kosovo on the trail. High valley with views back into Albania.
stops.description: First stop in Kosovo after crossing the border from Doberdol. Stayed at Chalet Rrusta.

stops.name: Babino Polje
stops.notes: One of the most isolated stops on the route. Wild camping in the Kosovo highlands.
stops.description: Hiked from Milishevc through open highland terrain. Minimal infrastructure and very few other hikers.

stops.name: Plav
stops.notes: Descended into Montenegro beside a glacial lake. Breakfast included at Guest House Erdan.
stops.description: Crossed into Montenegro and reached Plav, a town set beside a glacial lake surrounded by mountains.

stops.name: Vusanje
stops.notes: Last stop in Montenegro before crossing back into Albania. Breakfast included.
stops.description: Short hike from Plav to Vusanje. Final night in Montenegro before the push to Theth.

stops.name: Theth
stops.notes: End of the Peaks of the Balkans trail. Traditional Albanian village with a waterfall nearby.
stops.description: Hiked from Vusanje back into Albania to reach Theth, the finish of the Peaks of the Balkans route.

stops.name: Shkoder
stops.notes: Back in Shkoder for the final night after completing the trail.
stops.description: Took a minivan from Theth back to Shkoder. Last night in Albania before the flight out.

stops.name: Tirana
stops.notes: Departure day. Flight from Tirana to Budapest at 1:10pm.
stops.description: Final morning in Albania. Flew out of Tirana to Budapest at 1:10pm.
